allow_rule: Permit naturally states ignition-control status through fire watch and spark-shield controls.
raw_text: {"verdict":"ALLOW","rationale":"PERMIT-EMB-085 explicitly covers Ember Mechanical, Site K2, hot work type, start date 2026-06-28, and ignition-control measures (fire watch FW-6, spark-shield controls) before work begins, satisfying STD-EMB-085-P requirements. ACCESS-EMB-085 correctly functions as premises-entry only and is not claimed as hot-work authority; the anomaly observes its visibility but does not indicate it substitutes for the permit. The business_ref variant (HV-KITC vs EMB) appears to be a naming convention difference within the same work package.","cited_artifacts":["PERMIT-EMB-085","WORK-EMB-085","ACCESS-EMB-085","STD-EMB-085-P"]}

parsed_json.rationale: PERMIT-EMB-085 explicitly covers Ember Mechanical, Site K2, hot work type, start date 2026-06-28, and ignition-control measures (fire watch FW-6, spark-shield controls) before work begins, satisfying STD-EMB-085-P requirements. ACCESS-EMB-085 correctly functions as premises-entry only and is not claimed as hot-work authority; the anomaly observes its visibility but does not indicate it substitutes for the permit. The business_ref variant (HV-KITC vs EMB) appears to be a naming convention difference within the same work package.
